nasb.text: Whenever those went, these went; and whenever those stood still, these stood still. And whenever those rose from the earth, the wheels rose close beside them; for the spirit of the living beings was in the wheels.

esv.text: When those went, these went; and when those stood, these stood; and when those rose from the earth, the wheels rose along with them, for the spirit of the living creatures was in the wheels.

cnv.text: 活物走動，輪子也隨著移動；活物站著不動，輪子也不動；活物從地上升起，輪子也隨著升起，因為活物的靈是在輪子裡面。

ccb.text: 活物行走，轮子也行走；活物站立不动，轮子也站立不动；活物上升，轮子也跟着上升，因为活物的灵在轮子里。
